news.title: Morgan Stanley’s bitcoin ETF draws $34 million on day one
news.summary: Morgan Stanley’s low-fee bitcoin ETF debuted with strong early trading, signaling demand as competition shifts to cost and distribution.

news.title: Michael Saylor says bitcoin has likely bottomed, quantum risk overblown
news.summary: Speaking at a Mizuho event, the Strategy (MSTR) executive chairman said the formation of banking credit pairing with digital credit will be the catalyst for the next bull market.

news.title: Yuga Labs settles Bored Ape NFT lawsuit, ending fight over alleged copycat tokens
news.summary: The settlement avoids a trial and ends the dispute over the RR/BAYC NFTs, which claimed to parody Bored Ape Yacht Club, one of the most recognizable NFT brands.
